items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in Zone 2 (around 130-145 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:10 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on lower body strength with 3 sets of 10-12 reps of squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Include core exercises like planks (3 sets of 30 seconds).

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a comfortable pace of 7:00-7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (around 120-130 bpm) to aid recovery.
